# outstandingUserInfoTransfers

**Instance Property**

An array of in-progress data transfers.

## Declaration

```swift
var outstandingUserInfoTransfers: [WCSessionUserInfoTransfer] { get }
```

## Discussion

This property contains the [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSessionUserInfoTransfer] objects representing the data that you queued using the [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSession/transferUserInfo(_:)] or [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSession/transferCurrentComplicationUserInfo(_:)] methods. Use the objects in this array to cancel specific data transfers.

## Transferring Data in the Background

- **transferUserInfo(_:)**: Sends the specified data dictionary to the counterpart.

items.description: Sends the specified data dictionary to the counterpart.
